seo.title: Auth Fly — Open SSO IdP, Hosted UI, Adaptive SDKs
seo.description: Auth Fly is an open auth construction kit: a self-hosted SAML 2.0 + OIDC IdP, a UI8Kit-based hosted UI, and adaptive SDKs for any language or framework. PoC live, MVP in active development.
seo.keywords: Auth Fly, open source SSO, self-hosted IdP, SAML 2.0, OpenID Connect, OIDC provider, Hanko, UI8Kit, AuthKit TS, adaptive SDK, security hardening, no telemetry

hero.title: Auth Fly
hero.subtitle: SSO. SDKs. Adapters. Take off.
hero.description: Auth Fly is a self-hosted SSO Identity Provider for SAML 2.0 and OIDC, a hosted UI on UI8Kit, and adaptive SDKs that fit any language or framework. PoC is live with Hanko as the credential backend; MVP runs on Supabase or your own Postgres. No telemetry, no hidden update channels — security tracked in the open.

path.label: Hypothesis
path.note: Self-hosted alternative to hosted auth platforms — without telemetry, without third-party update calls

path.label: Architecture
path.note: core / authkit / authkit-hanko split — provider-agnostic contracts before code

path.label: PoC live
path.note: SAML 2.0 + OIDC sharing one signed IdP session, Hanko as credential backend

path.label: MVP in flight
path.note: Pre-flight security checklist, Supabase / custom Postgres backend, Console scaffolding

path.label: Roadmap
path.note: SCIM, Audit logs, Organizations, MFA, Webhooks — staged in the open

pillars.label: Security first
pillars.desc: No telemetry, no third-party update calls. Hardening tracked publicly via a pre-flight checklist.

pillars.label: IdP core
pillars.desc: SAML 2.0 IdP and OIDC Provider sharing one signed session cookie, Hanko-backed for the PoC.

pillars.label: Hosted UI
pillars.desc: UI8Kit-based login, logout and error pages with embedded i18n and dark theme — served from your own origin.

pillars.label: Adaptive SDKs
pillars.desc: One TypeScript core; thin adapters per provider and per language — start with Hanko today.

quote.text: Replace slide decks with logs, signed assertions, and a pre-flight checklist. The story is in the protocol.
